texto: In the law, rights are islands of empowerment. . . . Rights contain images of power, and manipulating those images, either visually or linguistically, is central in the making and maintenance of rights. In principle, therefore, the more dizzyingly diverse the images that are propagated, the more empowered we will be as a society.
explicacao: Citação de Patricia J. Williams sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “In the law, rights are islands of empowerment. . . . Rights contain images of power, and manipula…” articula reflexao, diversity, empowerment em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como empowerment e law.
